title: Dendry Mod Studio v0.97.8 preview update is ready

titleLocalized.en: Dendry Mod Studio v0.97.8 preview update is ready
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: Dendry Mod Studio v0.97.8 預覽更新已可使用

body: v0.97.8 focuses on practical authoring: route understanding, guided route edits, clearer choice-path editing, sturdier Review & Apply, and a playable Starter Demo.

bodyLocalized.en: v0.97.8 focuses on practical authoring: route understanding, guided route edits, clearer choice-path editing, sturdier Review & Apply, and a playable Starter Demo.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: v0.97.8 聚焦於實際創作：路由理解、引導式路由編輯、更清楚的選項路徑編輯、更穩定的審查與套用，以及可遊玩的 Starter Demo。

details:
This preview improves the event editor around player-facing choice paths, route evidence, and source-backed Review & Apply. Route Map now has stronger DendryNexus semantics for dynamic routes, guided edit entries for safe utility pairs, route tables, and explicit fallback helpers, while unsafe JS remains a manual boundary. The bundled Starter Demo is now a small playable office loop with cards, advisors, events, time, news-like beats, and editable images.

This is still an unsigned preview build. Please keep backups of real projects, review install plans before applying changes, and report any confusing editor behavior or broken preview output.

detailsLocalized.en:
This preview improves the event editor around player-facing choice paths, route evidence, and source-backed Review & Apply. Route Map now has stronger DendryNexus semantics for dynamic routes, guided edit entries for safe utility pairs, route tables, and explicit fallback helpers, while unsafe JS remains a manual boundary. The bundled Starter Demo is now a small playable office loop with cards, advisors, events, time, news-like beats, and editable images.

This is still an unsigned preview build. Please keep backups of real projects, review install plans before applying changes, and report any confusing editor behavior or broken preview output.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant:
這個預覽版改善了事件編輯器中的玩家選項路徑、路由證據，以及 source-backed 審查與套用。Route Map 現在更嚴格理解 DendryNexus 的動態路由語意，並為安全的 utility pair、route table 與 explicit fallback 提供引導式編輯入口；不安全的 JS 仍保持人工邊界。內建 Starter Demo 也升級為一個可遊玩的小型辦公室循環，包含卡牌、顧問、事件、時間、類新聞節點與可編輯圖片。

這仍是未簽署的預覽版。請保留真實專案備份，在套用修改前檢查 install plan；如果遇到令人困惑的編輯行為或破損預覽，也歡迎回報。

notices.title: v0.97.8 preview update is ready

titleLocalized.zh-Hant: v0.97.8 預覽更新已可使用

notices.body: v0.97.8 focuses on practical authoring: route understanding, guided route edits, clearer choice-path editing, sturdier Review & Apply, and a playable Starter Demo.

notices.title: A note about the dev preview

titleLocalized.en: A note about the dev preview

notices.body: Studio is still in active feature development. There will be bugs and missing workflows, and your reports help decide what gets fixed next.

bodyLocalized.en: Studio is still in active feature development. There will be bugs and missing workflows, and your reports help decide what gets fixed next.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: Studio 仍處於積極功能開發中。現在仍會有 Bug 與缺失流程，而你的回報會幫助決定下一步修什麼。

notices.details:
The editor is becoming more capable, but it is not yet at the stage where development can focus only on polish and repairs. If something feels confusing, too manual, unsafe, or simply absent, that is useful feedback.

The most helpful report includes the Studio version, OS, mod name, source path if available, what you tried, what you expected, and what actually happened.

detailsLocalized.en:
The editor is becoming more capable, but it is not yet at the stage where development can focus only on polish and repairs. If something feels confusing, too manual, unsafe, or simply absent, that is useful feedback.

The most helpful report includes the Studio version, OS, mod name, source path if available, what you tried, what you expected, and what actually happened.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant:
編輯器正在變得更有能力，但專案還沒有進入只需要打磨和修繕的階段。如果某個地方讓你困惑、太手動、不放心，或乾脆缺少入口，這些都是有用回饋。

最有幫助的回報會包含 Studio 版本、作業系統、Mod 名稱、可用的 source 路徑、你嘗試了什麼、原本期待什麼，以及實際發生了什麼。

notices.title: Trying a real mod? Please tell me where it breaks.

titleLocalized.en: Trying a real mod? Please tell me where it breaks.
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: 正在測試真實 Mod？歡迎告訴我哪裡壞了。

notices.body: The most useful v0.97.8 feedback is about real editing flows: complex events, guided route edits, Review & Apply, Runtime Preview, the Starter Demo, material browsing, and Windows install speed.

bodyLocalized.en: The most useful v0.97.8 feedback is about real editing flows: complex events, guided route edits, Review & Apply, Runtime Preview, the Starter Demo, material browsing, and Windows install speed.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: v0.97.8 最需要的回饋是真實編輯流程：複合事件、引導式路由編輯、審查與套用、Runtime Preview、Starter Demo、素材瀏覽，以及 Windows 安裝速度。

notices.details: Screenshots are very helpful for layout or preview problems. For editing bugs, source paths and the generated install plan are even better because they make the issue reproducible.

detailsLocalized.en: Screenshots are very helpful for layout or preview problems. For editing bugs, source paths and the generated install plan are even better because they make the issue reproducible.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant: 如果是版面或預覽問題，截圖很有幫助。如果是編輯錯誤，source 路徑和生成的 install plan 更有價值，因為它們能讓問題被重現。

notices.title: Report a problem
notices.body: Use GitHub Issues when Studio crashes, applies a confusing plan, parses an event incorrectly, or produces a broken preview.

bodyLocalized.en: Use GitHub Issues when Studio crashes, applies a confusing plan, parses an event incorrectly, or produces a broken preview.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: 當 Studio 當機、產生難以理解的套用計畫、錯誤解析事件，或做出破損預覽時，請使用 GitHub Issues 回報。

notices.details: A good bug report includes your operating system, Studio version, whether you used browser or desktop mode, the project or mod name, the exact action, and any diagnostics or error text shown by Studio.

detailsLocalized.en: A good bug report includes your operating system, Studio version, whether you used browser or desktop mode, the project or mod name, the exact action, and any diagnostics or error text shown by Studio.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant: 好的問題回報會包含：作業系統、Studio 版本、使用瀏覽器或桌面模式、專案或 Mod 名稱、實際操作步驟，以及 Studio 顯示的診斷或錯誤文字。

notices.title: Request a feature
notices.body: Open a feature request when you find a missing editor surface, workflow shortcut, or compatibility need.

bodyLocalized.en: Open a feature request when you find a missing editor surface, workflow shortcut, or compatibility need.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: 如果你發現缺少編輯介面、流程捷徑或相容性需求，可以提出功能需求。

notices.details: Feature requests are most useful when they describe the source pattern you are editing, what Studio already detects, and what the smallest safe workflow should do.

detailsLocalized.en: Feature requests are most useful when they describe the source pattern you are editing, what Studio already detects, and what the smallest safe workflow should do.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant: 功能需求若能描述你正在修改的 source 慣例、Studio 目前已能偵測的內容，以及最小安全流程應該做什麼，會最有幫助。
